brief_justification: Agent correctly identifies (C) with valid multi-evidence reasoning chain; traces second-order effects (insider staging a fake break-in) and connects E3/E4/E6 into a coherent pattern; categorizes evidence by source reliability (logs vs. testimony) showing process awareness but doesn't explicitly name potential biases; applies counterfactual check on option D ('re-arming would flag a faulted zone') and eliminates all alternatives with specific falsifiers; distinguishes 'pure speculation' from supported claims and tags reliability levels, but doesn't formally state confidence intervals or what would change the conclusion; all four options evaluated with explicit rejection reasons grounded in specific evidence; every conclusion traces to a numbered evidence item and the timeline table; explicitly builds and relies on temporal sequence before causal assignment, directly avoiding the reverse-causality anti-pattern; zero evidence of coincidence_conflation or reverse_causality_blindness, and temporal audit is foregrounded; follows branching structure (timeline establishment → ambiguity check → option gates) but doesn't make the topology's G1/G2/G3 gate logic explicit in the response text
